Premium Mechanical Keyboard

$149.99

In Stock - Ships within 24 hours

★★★★☆ (127 reviews)

Product Description

Experience the ultimate typing experience with our Premium Mechanical Keyboard. Featuring Cherry MX switches, customizable RGB lighting, and aircraft-grade aluminum construction.

Key Features

  • Cherry MX Blue switches for tactile feedback
  • Per-key RGB backlighting with 16.8 million colors
  • Detachable USB-C cable for portability
  • N-key rollover for gaming performance
  • Dedicated media controls and volume wheel
  • PBT keycaps for durability

Technical Specifications

Switch TypeCherry MX Blue
LayoutFull-size (104 keys)
ConnectionUSB-C (detachable)
BacklightingPer-key RGB
Dimensions440 x 135 x 40 mm
Weight1.2 kg

The build quality is exceptional and the typing feel is perfect. The RGB customization software is intuitive.
